series_metadata.series_title: John R. Justice Student Loan Repayment Program
series_metadata.series_description: Request checks from OBM, applications, awardee and non-awardee data and correspondence from applicants related to this program. Other related records

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain awardee records until cancellation/forgiveness or payment in full, then destroy. Retain non-awardee records for 1 year, then destroy. For all administrative records, retain in office for 5 years, then destroy. Paper records may be scanned and destroyed if desired. ; Electronic: Retain awardee records until cancellation/forgiveness or payment in full, then destroy. Retain non-awardee records for 1 year, then destroy. For all administrative records, retain in office for 5 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
